data.name: Punishment NyanNyan
data.detailed_description:
"Punishment NyanNyan" is a visual novel game consisting of animation for adults.
After all his misdeeds, Seiga has finally become a rope...The villagers' "punishment" begins now!!
-----------------------------------------------------------------------
■Work introduction
A collection of slimy erotic videos sent in 30fps animation (*MP4 for mobile available)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------
■Contents
Actual scene: 6 types + OP/ED
Number of video files: 55 (with MP4 for mobile)

・Doggy Style
・Irrumatio
・Bondage
・Full Nelson
・Vibrator
・Doggy Style2 (New!)
・Ending

【basic action】
Hold → Penetrate → Soft → Hard → Orgasm → Continue → Finish
Move each scene with one click

-----------------------------------------------------------------------
■Notes
*Please check the operation of the trial version before purchasing.

data.short_description: "Punishment NyanNyan" is a visual novel game consisting of animation for adults.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: windows10
  • 處理器: 2GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 100 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
